calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jul-13-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned by Department 206 on June 29, 2020 for Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Japheth Dillman.
Dept: 514. Judge: Gerardo C Sandoval. Clerk: K. Dougherty. Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098. Telephone: 415-551-3680. Email: gcasey@sftc.org.

Jeffrey A. Feldman, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Jennifer Elliott, who was placed under oath and testified.
Both Ms. Elliott and Mr. Feldman appeared for this morning's proceedings via CourtCall.
No appearance by defendant Japheth Dillman.
Plaintiff's complaint for Breach of Contract was filed on April 18, 2019.
Defendant's verified answer to the complaint was filed on July 3, 2019.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was served on August 30, 2019, setting trial for April 13, 2020.
Second Notice of Time and Place of Trial was served on April 27, 2020, setting trial for June 29, 2020.
Notice of Continuance of Time and Place of Trial was served on July 8, 2020, with trial set for today, July 13, 2020.
DOE defendants were dismissed July 2, 2020.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Jennifer Elliott, and against defendant Japheth Dillman, as follows:

Principal/Damages - $255,000.00. (Amount pled in complaint).
Prejudgment Interest - $26,308.20.
Attorney Fees - $112,523.28.
Costs - $450.00.

Total - $394,281.48.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
